task: Global 'C' hotkey opens create-task modal; on a project page the modal pre-selects that project

stories.title: Pressing 'C' globally opens the create-task modal
acceptanceCriteria: task-dialogs-provider registers a 'c' hotkey that calls openCreate()
The 'c' hotkey does NOT fire while typing in form fields / contenteditable (react-hotkeys-hook default, enableOnFormTags not set)
Pressing 'c' while the dialog is already open is a no-op (no form reset)
bun run build passes (tsc + vite build)

stories.title: On a project page, opening the create-task modal pre-selects that project
acceptanceCriteria: openCreate derives projectId from a /projects/:projectId pathname when the caller does not provide one
Explicit init.projectId from existing callers (task-sessions, create-task-floating) still wins
On /projects (list) or other pages, no project is forced and existing first-project default behaviour is preserved
